prompt: Generate an image of a bustling city street during sunset, using the reference mask image to preserve the layout of people and cars
prompt_refined: Generate a photorealistic image of a bustling city street at sunset. Use the spatial layout from image 1, featuring a wide road populated with multiple cars. On the left, a sidewalk with two pedestrians and a building; a prominent traffic light pole extends overhead across the street. Another pedestrian is visible crossing the street towards the right. The background is filled with trees and buildings, all rendered with warm, golden hour lighting.
objects: two pedestrians on the left sidewalk
traffic light extending overhead across the street
pedestrian crossing the street towards the right
